message:
Port Wizer to WAMR runtime

- Replace WasmEdge-based wizer with WAMR implementation
- Add wizer_wamr.zig with full memory snapshot/rewrite logic
- Update build.zig to link wizer against WAMR instead of WasmEdge
- Handle large memory offsets (>2GB) via i32 bitcast

Note: Generated WASM works but has runtime memory access issues
that need debugging.
